scripts.test:home: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/home-interacciones.test.ts componentes/home/interaccionesHome.ts contenido/home/contenidoHome.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/home-interacciones.test.js
scripts.test:catalogo: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/catalogo-filtros.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/filtrosCatalogo.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/catalogo-filtros.test.js
